study_title: Digital Lifestyle Coaching for Adults With Type 2 Diabetes (DLC-T2D)
design_summary: 24-week, single-arm study of a smartphone-based lifestyle coaching program (nutrition, physical activity, and glucose-awareness education). Participants use the study app daily and complete a short remote check-in every 4 weeks.

criteria.probe: To start, how old are you?

criteria.text: Physician-diagnosed type 2 diabetes. (Type 1, gestational diabetes, and prediabetes do NOT qualify.)
criteria.probe: What type of diabetes have you been diagnosed with?

criteria.text: Most recent HbA1c between 7.0% and 10.5% inclusive, measured within the past 6 months.
criteria.probe: What was your most recent HbA1c result, and roughly when was it measured?
criteria.unknown_rule: If the participant cannot provide an HbA1c value OR cannot say roughly when it was measured, INC3 is unknown.

criteria.text: Owns a smartphone (iOS or Android) with internet access, and is willing to use the study app daily.
criteria.probe: Do you own a smartphone, and would you be comfortable using our study app every day?

criteria.text: Able to read and understand English.
criteria.probe: Are you able to read and understand English comfortably?

criteria.text: Willing to participate for the full 24 weeks, including a check-in every 4 weeks.
criteria.probe: The program runs a full 24 weeks with a short check-in every 4 weeks - is that a commitment you can make?

criteria.text: Currently pregnant or breastfeeding, or planning pregnancy within the next 6 months.
criteria.probe: Are you currently pregnant or breastfeeding, or planning a pregnancy in the next six months?

criteria.text: Chronic kidney disease stage 4 or 5, eGFR below 30, or currently on dialysis.
criteria.probe: Have you ever been told you have chronic kidney disease, or are you on dialysis?
criteria.unknown_rule: If the participant reports possible kidney problems but cannot state a stage, eGFR, or dialysis status, EXC2 is unknown.

criteria.text: Currently using an insulin pump or automated insulin delivery (closed-loop) system. Insulin by injection (pens/syringes) is allowed.
criteria.probe: Do you use an insulin pump or any automated insulin delivery device?

criteria.text: Hospitalized for a diabetes-related event (e.g., diabetic ketoacidosis, hyperosmolar state, severe hypoglycemia) within the past 3 months.
criteria.probe: In the past three months, have you been hospitalized for a diabetes-related problem?

criteria.text: Currently enrolled in another interventional clinical trial or structured lifestyle program.
criteria.probe: Are you currently enrolled in another clinical trial or a structured lifestyle program?
